name: Chinese Cashew Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chicken broth or bouillon cube dissolved in water
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the chicken breasts horizontally into very thin slices and then cut into inch squares. Place on a tray.
2. Prepare the vegetables: remove ends and strings from pea pods, slice mushrooms, chop the green part of onions, and slice bamboo shoots.
3. Mix together soy sauce, cornstarch, sugar, and salt in a bowl.
4. Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a skillet over moderate heat. Add the cashew nuts and cook for 1 minute, shaking the pan to lightly toast them.
5. Remove the cashews and set aside. Pour remaining oil into the pan. Fry the chicken quickly, turning often until it becomes opaque.
6. Lower the heat to low. Add pea pods, mushrooms, and broth. Cover and cook slowly for 2 minutes.
7. Remove the cover and add the soy sauce mixture, bamboo shoots. Cook until thickened, stirring constantly.
8. Simmer uncovered for a bit longer. Stir in green onions and cashews. Serve immediately.
